title: [Snyk Code] Jinja auto-escape is set to false.
description:
## Jinja auto-escape is set to false.

**Project:** `AnthusAI/Plexus`

**Location:** line 115, column 32 to line 115, column 40
**Classes:** CWE-CWE-79
### Snippet (plexus/scores/nodes/YesOrNoClassifier.py:113-117)
```
 113 |                     
 114 |                     # Format the explanation message using Jinja2 template
 115 |                     template = Template(self.parameters.explanation_message)
 116 |                     formatted_explanation_message = template.render(**template_state)
 117 |                     
```

**Issue Key:** 3dbbb37e-ea37-4736-acb4-69e8ffee1901

### Details
Jinja auto-escape is set to false.

**Fix:** Review and remediate in code.
